there is a pretty fundamental moral difference between starting a fight and joining someone else's fight when they ask for your help
it's not IF you step in, it's WHEN - I don't come from a moral background where pre-determined success is a deciding factor in deciding whether to help someone or not

i am sorry to be reductionist but for me it's as simple as, how many times do you have to see a bully punch an innocent kid in the face before you step in; the answer is different for everyone, but I don't think anyone fundamentally thinks the right action is to let it continue

posts.title: Processing Telegram Leaks for Fast Web Visualization
posts.dek: In which I describe my workflow for transforming a Telegram database dump into a web-friendly format for analysis and visualization
